questions.question_context: Learning a new language can seem daunting at first.
questions.explanation_ar: كلمة daunting تعني شيئاً مخيفاً أو صعباً ومثبطاً للعزيمة.

questions.question_context: Astronauts must sustain themselves for years on Mars.
questions.explanation_ar: كلمة sustain تعني المحافظة على شيء والاستمرار فيه.

questions.question_context: Temperatures can plummet to minus 80 degrees on Mars.
questions.explanation_ar: كلمة plummet تعني الهبوط أو الانخفاض الشديد والسريع.

options.text: Unless astronauts will train hard, they won't survive.
Unless astronauts train hard, they won't survive.
Unless astronauts don't train hard, they won't survive.
Unless astronauts trained hard, they won't survive.

questions.explanation_ar: بعد unless نستخدم المضارع البسيط (train) وليس will أو don't أو الماضي.

options.text: As long as if the oxygen lasts, they will survive.
As long as the oxygen lasts, they will survive.
As long as the oxygen will last, they will survive.
As long as the oxygen lasted, they will survive.

questions.explanation_ar: بعد as long as نستخدم المضارع البسيط (lasts) وليس will أو if أو الماضي.

questions.question_text: What percentage is Mars's atmosphere carbon dioxide?
questions.question_context: Passage B: 'The planet's atmosphere, which is 95% carbon dioxide, cannot support human breathing.'
questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن غلاف المريخ الجوي يتكون من 95% من ثاني أكسيد الكربون.

questions.question_text: 'Unless you wear a spacesuit, you will die on Mars' is correct.
questions.explanation_ar: الجملة صحيحة. unless تعني 'إذا لم' وتُتبع بالمضارع البسيط، وهذا صحيح هنا.

questions.question_text: Mars rovers have traveled over 50 km on Mars.
questions.question_context: Passage A: 'Scientists have reported that these mechanical explorers have traveled over 50 kilometers across the Martian surface.'
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. ذكر النص أن مركبات المريخ قطعت أكثر من 50 كيلومتراً على سطح الكوكب.

questions.question_text: A crew of four needs a greenhouse of ____ square meters on Mars.
questions.question_context: Passage B: 'NASA's studies suggest that a crew of four could sustain themselves with a greenhouse covering approximately 200 square meters.'
questions.explanation_ar: وفقاً للنص، يحتاج طاقم من أربعة أشخاص إلى دفيئة مساحتها 200 متر مربع تقريباً.

questions.question_text: Match each English word to its Arabic meaning:
questions.explanation_ar: طابق كل كلمة إنجليزية مع معناها الصحيح باللغة العربية.
